display_information.name: KortixDevTest
display_information.description: A coding teammate that lives in your Slack
display_information.long_description:
Kortix is a coding teammate for your Slack workspace.

Invite the bot to a channel, @-mention it with a task, and it'll get on it: reading your codebase, running the work in an isolated sandbox, and replying in the thread as it goes. Follow-ups stay in the same conversation — Kortix remembers the context.

*What it can do*
• Read your repo, search docs, summarize threads
• Open PRs, edit files, run scripts and tests in a real sandbox
• Pull data, generate reports, share CSVs and files back into the thread
• Pick up where it left off — every thread keeps its full context

*A few things teammates ask it*
• `@Kortix scan this codebase and write me a one-pager`
• `@Kortix open a PR that switches our logger to pino`
• `@Kortix what changed on main this week?`
• `@Kortix pull yesterday's sign-ups, group them by source, drop the CSV here`

Connect a Kortix project once, then talk to Kortix like you'd talk to anyone else on the team. No slash commands. No copy-paste. Just @-mention and reply.

*AI Disclaimer*
Kortix uses AI to generate responses and perform tasks. While we strive for accuracy, AI-generated content may occasionally contain errors. Review important outputs before acting on them.

Managed by Kortix · https://kortix.com

slash_commands.description: Manage your Kortix project from Slack
